data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. LIGHTNING TIGER box seated before sticking on well to finish half a length away in third (17.96) at this track in a Maiden over 324m. Can find winning form. 8. SHOW MORE had to overcome traffic and was hampered for a run before finishing a distant third (18.07) in a Maiden over 324m at this track. Worth following up. 1. ANJO STATUE held his own to the line last start and filled a minor placing, beaten only a neck (17.95) behind Pay Me at this track. Expected to be in this for a long way. 5. ABSCONDING is a newcomer from the Kristy Sultana kennel. No favours with the draw and will need to begin well. Market to provide the best guide to his chances.","runners":[7,8,1,5],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: RICHMOND STRAIGHT-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
